heading: Omitted
label: 2501 to 2512 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 2501 to 2512 terminated as of , pursuant to .Aug. 31, 1965section 2525 of this titleSection 2501, , , , stated Congressional declaration of purpose for Area Redevelopment Program.Pub. L. 87–27, § 275 Stat. 47May 1, 1961Section 2502, , , ; , , , provided for appointment and duties of Area Redevelopment Administrator.Pub. L. 87–27, § 375 Stat. 48Pub. L. 88–426, title III, § 305(22)78 Stat. 425May 1, 1961Aug. 14, 1964Section 2503, , , , provided for creation of membership and functions of Area Redevelopment Advisory Policy Board and for National Public Advisory Committee on Area Redevelopment.Pub. L. 87–27, § 475 Stat. 48May 1, 1961Section 2504, , , , provided for designation of redevelopment areas by Secretary of Commerce and promulgation of standards for determination and use of facts and data.Pub. L. 87–27, § 575 Stat. 48May 1, 1961Section 2505, , , 75 Stat 50, set forth limitations on loans and participation for industrial projects and set terms, conditions, restrictions, and limitations thereon.Pub. L. 87–27, § 6May 1, 1961Section 2506, , , , provided for application and conditions for loans for public facilities.Pub. L. 87–27, § 775 Stat. 52May 1, 1961Section 2507, , , , provided for application, conditions and amounts of grants for public facilities.Pub. L. 87–27, § 875 Stat. 53May 1, 1961Section 2508, , , , provided for notes and obligations, amount, form and denomination, date of maturity, terms and conditions, interest rate, purchase and sale by Secretary of the Treasury of funds for Area Redevelopment Fund.Pub. L. 87–27, § 975 Stat. 54May 1, 1961Section 2509, , , , provided for assistance, information and advice and business firm list to procurement divisions of Federal instrumentalities.Pub. L. 87–27, § 1075 Stat. 55May 1, 1961Section 2510, , , , authorized Secretary of Commerce to provide technical assistance and authorized appropriations for purposes of this section.Pub. L. 87–27, § 1175 Stat. 55May 1, 1961Section 2511, , , , set forth powers of Secretary of Commerce in performing his duties under this chapter.Pub. L. 87–27, § 1275 Stat. 55May 1, 1961Section 2512, , , , provided for termination of eligibility for further assistance as a redevelopment area.Pub. L. 87–27, § 1375 Stat. 57May 1, 1961
